description: Complete SWIFT disconnection and asset freeze on Iranian central bank
Sanctions on 47 IRGC senior commanders and their financial networks
Executive order banning all Iranian crude purchases; secondary sanctions on buyers
EU bans port access for Iranian-flagged vessels; insurance blacklist expanded
Export ban on dual-use technology, semiconductors, and drone components to Iran
Full EU sanctions package: oil embargo, banking restrictions, asset freezes
Treasury designates 120+ entities linked to Hezbollah financing
UNSC Resolution extends and strengthens arms embargo on Iran (China/Russia abstain)
Sanctions on Iranian steel, aluminum, copper, and iron sectors
EU designates PMU, Houthi, and Hezbollah financial facilitators
Secondary sanctions on Chinese companies purchasing Iranian crude
Sanctions on Iranian cyber warfare units responsible for attacks on allied infrastructure
